data: Easy New York Cheesecake: Process 1.5 cups graham cracker crumbs with 1/4 cup melted butter and press into a springform pan. Beat four 8oz packages of softened cream cheese with 1 cup sugar and 1 tsp vanilla until smooth. Blend in 4 large eggs one at a time. Pour over crust and bake at 325F (160C) for 55 minutes, then chill for 4 hours.
